index.title: Opinions
index.subtitle: Opinions from educators with credentials in each topic. Newest first, never ranked.
index.emptyFieldDescription: No opinions in this topic yet.
index.emptyAllDescription: Educators with credentials in a topic can post opinion videos here. Be the first.

detail.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw this opinion? The video will be removed from this device and the post hidden.

new.title: Post an Opinion
new.intro: Opinions belong to a topic. To post in a topic you need at least one credential at the apply level or higher for a skill in that topic.
new.noEligibleWarning: You don't have a qualifying credential yet. Earn a credential at the apply level or higher in any skill, and you'll be able to post opinions in that skill's topic.
new.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Why functional-first is the wrong default for CS1
new.summaryPlaceholder: A one-line framing for the list view.
new.credentialsHelp: Choose which of your credentials back this opinion. At least one must qualify you to post in this topic — we've pre-selected those. You can add or remove credentials below.
new.noQualifying: You don't have a qualifying credential for this topic. Pick a different topic.
